categories.title: Manage Provider Categories
categories.hint: Select which product categories this provider commonly supplies.

delete.title: Delete Provider
delete.description: Are you sure you want to delete this provider? Providers with assigned categories must be cleaned up first.

delete.title: Delete Category
delete.description: Are you sure you want to delete this category?

locations.title: Locations
locations.permissionNote: Only administrators can modify locations. You can still review the catalog.

delete.title: Delete Location
delete.description: Delete? Products assigned to this location must be moved first.

sites.title: Sites
sites.description: Manage physical locations tied to the current company.
sites.noCompany: Create the company profile first before adding sites.

locations.title: Manage Site Locations
locations.hint: Select which warehouse or shelf locations can be used from this site.

delete.title: Delete Site
delete.description: Delete? Sites with sequentials or assigned locations cannot be deleted and should be cleaned up first.

company.title: Company
company.loading: Loading the business identity and workstation settings
company.createNote: This record is used by sites, future documents, and business settings.

tray.title: System Tray
tray.description: Control whether this workstation stays available from the desktop tray.
tray.desktopOnly: Tray settings are available in the Electron desktop app.
tray.showIconDescription: Keep a system tray icon available so the workstation can be reopened quickly.
tray.closeToTrayDescription: Hide the main window instead of quitting the app when the close button is used.

print.title: Receipt Print Settings
print.description: Configure how desktop receipt printing behaves for this workstation.
print.desktopOnly: Receipt print settings are available in the Electron desktop app.
print.silentPrintingDescription: Print receipts without showing the operating system print dialog.
print.printBackgroundDescription: Include receipt background styles and shading in the printed output.
print.saveError: Unable to save receipt print settings

logo.title: Logo Library
logo.description: Manage reusable tenant logos and choose which one represents the company.
logo.noLogoSelected: No logo selected for the company.
logo.emptyLibrary: No saved logos yet. Add one to start building a reusable brand library.
logo.deleteConfirmMessage: Delete {{name}}? Logos assigned to the company must be unassigned first.

sync.title: Sync Center
sync.description: Review queued changes, process the local sync queue, and resolve conflicts when a sync item needs manual attention.
sync.failedItems_one: {{count}} queued item already failed at least once
sync.failedItems_other: {{count}} queued items already failed at least once

toast.alreadyUpToDate: Sync is already up to date

queue.title: Pending Queue
queue.description: Most recent queued operations waiting to be acknowledged as synced.
queue.errorLocalMissing: The local record no longer exists. Discard the stale local change to continue syncing.
queue.errorConflictBlocked: This change is waiting for a conflict to be resolved.
queue.errorUnsupportedEntity: This kind of change cannot be synced yet.
queue.errorGeneric: We couldn't sync this change. Try processing the queue again.

conflict.title: Conflicts
conflict.description: Conflicts stop automatic sync for the affected entity until someone resolves them.
conflict.localRecordMissing: The local record no longer exists. Discard the stale local change to unblock sync.
conflict.keepLocalMessage: Keep the local {{entity}} changes and requeue them for sync?
conflict.acceptRemoteMessage: Accept the remote {{entity}} version and discard the local conflict state?
conflict.discardLocalMessage: The local {{entity}} record no longer exists. Discard this stale local change so the rest of the queue can continue?
conflict.mergeDescription: Review the local and remote payloads for this {{entity}}, then edit the merged JSON that should be requeued for sync.
conflict.jsonObjectRequired: Merged data must be a JSON object.
conflict.jsonInvalid: Merged data must be valid JSON.
conflict.recommendedAcceptRemote: Recommended: accept remote — the server has the most recent data.
conflict.recommendedDiscard: Recommended: discard the stale local change to unblock sync.
conflict.noFieldDiff: The local and remote versions differ.

updater.title: App Updates
updater.description: Review the desktop updater status, trigger a manual check, and restart when a download is ready to install.
updater.desktopOnly: App update controls are available in the Electron desktop app.
updater.downloading: The updater has found a newer release and is downloading it in the background.
updater.availableManualHint: A new version is available. Open the release page to download and install it.

rollout.label: Rollout
rollout.rollbackActive: Rollback is active for version {{version}}. Eligible workstations will return to this exact build during the next update cycle.

statusMessage.unavailable: Automatic updates are not available in this runtime.
statusMessage.checking: Checking the update service for a newer desktop build.
statusMessage.available: A new desktop version is being downloaded in the background.
statusMessage.availableManual: A new version is available to download.
statusMessage.downloaded: A downloaded update is ready. Restart the desktop app to apply it.
statusMessage.idle: This workstation is on the latest available desktop build.

toast.restartDescription: The desktop app will close and apply the downloaded release.

backup.title: Local Database Backup
backup.description: Create a point-in-time backup of the local SQLite database or restore a previous backup on this device.
backup.restoreWarning: Restore replaces the current local database. Use it only when you intentionally need to roll the workstation back to a prior state.
backup.desktopOnly: Backup and restore controls are available in the Electron desktop app. The browser build stays read-only for local database maintenance.

restoreModal.title: Restore Database Backup
restoreModal.message: Restoring a backup will replace the current local database and reload the app. Continue?

toast.desktopOnly: Backup is available only in the desktop app
toast.desktopOnlyDetail: Database backups are available only in the desktop app.
toast.restoreDesktopOnly: Restore is available only in the desktop app
toast.restoreDesktopOnlyDetail: Database restore is available only in the desktop app.
toast.restoredOk: Backup restored successfully. Reloading the application data...

empty.title: No backups yet
empty.description: Create a backup to keep a restore point of the local database.

keyPrompt.title: Backup key required
keyPrompt.message: This backup was created on a different device, so it is protected with that device's backup key. Open the backup card on the source device, reveal its backup key, and enter it here.
keyPrompt.invalidShape: The backup key must be exactly 64 hexadecimal characters.
keyPrompt.mismatch: That key does not open this backup. Check the key on the source device and try again.
keyPrompt.statusWaiting: The selected backup needs the source device's key to continue.

revealKey.confirmMessage: Anyone holding this key can read this device's backups. Only share it to restore a backup on another of your devices, and never send it over channels you do not trust.
revealKey.title: Backup key for this device
revealKey.message: Enter this key on the destination device when it asks for the backup key during a restore.
revealKey.copied: Backup key copied to the clipboard
revealKey.copyFailed: Could not copy the key. Select and copy it manually.
revealKey.failed: Could not retrieve the backup key

telemetry.title: Crash & performance telemetry
telemetry.description: Send anonymized error reports and span timings to the support team when something fails, so we can fix bugs without a phone call.
telemetry.privacy: Telemetry data inherits the local redaction policy. Passwords, tokens and authorization headers never leave the device. You can revoke consent at any time and the centralized pipe is shut off on the next request.

status.enabled: Telemetry is on. Crash reports and span timings reach the support pipeline.
status.disabled: Telemetry is off. Errors are still logged locally, but nothing leaves this device.

theme.title: Appearance
theme.description: Control the workstation theme and whether it follows the operating system.
theme.browserNote: Browser sessions store the theme preference locally in this device.

light.label: Light
light.description: Use the light interface across the workstation.

dark.label: Dark
dark.description: Use the dark interface across the workstation.

system.label: System
system.description: Follow the operating system appearance preference.

toast.systemDescription: The app now follows the system appearance.
toast.themeDescription: The app is now using the {{theme}} theme.

restaurant.title: Restaurant
restaurant.description: Tune the restaurant-mode behaviour that auto-applies on every checkout.
restaurant.serviceChargeHelp: Enter 0 to disable the auto-applied service line. Cap is {{max}}%.

cashClose.title: Cash close
cashClose.description: How the till count works when a session is closed.
cashClose.blindOnHint: Cashiers count without seeing the expected balance; managers and admins see the live over/short indicator.
cashClose.blindOffHint: Every role sees the live over/short indicator while counting.
cashClose.sessionNote: Changes reach each register on the next login or page refresh.

toast.saveError: The cash close settings could not be saved

lossPrevention.title: Loss prevention
lossPrevention.description: Set per-role checkout limits. A sale that crosses a limit is blocked until another authorized employee approves that exact checkout.

maxDiscount.label: Maximum discount without approval
maxDiscount.help: Includes line and cart discounts as a percentage of gross item value.

afterHours.label: Require approval during blocked hours
afterHours.help: Uses the company timezone and supports windows that cross midnight.

shift.title: Per-shift action limits
shift.help: Completed actions by this employee are counted from the start of their current cash session. Crossing either limit requires a separate approval.

refunds.label: Limit refunds per shift
refunds.help: Uses the full refunded sale amount in the company currency.

voids.label: Limit voids per shift
voids.help: Uses the full voided sale amount in the company currency.

noSale.label: Limit no-sale drawer opens
noSale.help: Counts manual drawer opens that are not part of completing a sale.

lossPrevention.validation: Enter discount limits from 0% to 100%, valid shift limits, and different start and end times for each enabled blocked window.
lossPrevention.auditNote: Every policy change and every checkout that triggers a rule is recorded in the audit log without cart or customer details.

toast.saveError: The checkout controls could not be saved

form.name: Unit Name
form.dimensionHint: Groups units by quantity (mass, volume…). Leave on automatic and the system infers it.
form.standardCodeHint: Required by DIAN e-invoicing. Empty = inferred from the unit.

delete.title: Delete Unit
delete.description: Are you sure you want to delete this unit?

delete.title: Delete VAT Rate
delete.description: Are you sure you want to delete this VAT rate?

sequentials.title: Sequentials
sequentials.description: Configure prefixes and next numbers per site and document type.
sequentials.noSite: Create at least one active site before configuring sequentials.
sequentials.incrementNote: Sequence increments during sale and purchase finalization will be implemented later. This page only manages the stored prefix and current counter.

validation.currentValueMin: Current value must be zero or greater

countries.description: Manage the normalized country catalog used by department, city, and supplier records.

departments.description: Manage the normalized department catalog used by city and supplier records.

cities.description: Manage the normalized city catalog used by supplier records.

delete.countryMessage: Delete {{name}}? You must remove or move all departments assigned to this country first.
delete.departmentMessage: Delete {{name}}? You must remove or move all cities assigned to this department first.
delete.cityMessage: Delete {{name}}? Providers assigned to this city must be moved first.

users.title: Users
users.description: Create staff accounts, assign roles, and reset passwords.
users.permissionNote: Only administrators can access user management.

permissions.title: Default role permissions
permissions.description: Review the workspace access assigned to each staff role before creating or updating an account.
permissions.caption: Default workspace access by role

roleDescriptions.admin: Full tenant setup, financial controls, staff, and daily operations.
roleDescriptions.manager: Daily operations, catalog, inventory, procurement, and customers.
roleDescriptions.cashier: Sales and the enabled point-of-service surfaces.
roleDescriptions.viewer: Read-only access to the dashboard overview.

permissions.note: This matrix shows default workspace access. Active modules can hide individual tools, and server authorization is always enforced for every action.

resetPassword.title: Reset Password
resetPassword.description: Set a new temporary password for

staffPin.title: Manage staff PIN
staffPin.description: Set a 6-digit PIN for {{name}}. Cashier PINs can switch shared workstations; a PIN never replaces full sign-in for manager or admin access.
staffPin.label: New 6-digit PIN
staffPin.requirement: Use exactly 6 numbers. The PIN is stored as a one-way Argon2id hash.

toast.claimsChanged: Your account claims changed. Please sign in again
toast.passwordChanged: Your password changed. Please sign in again
toast.pinError: Unable to update the staff PIN
